title: ligustrum × ibolium
intro: Ligustrum × ibolium, also known as Japanese Privet or Gama Saptaparna, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Oleaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ligustrum × ibolium include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to support overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
